description: Remove Go Router from the frontend Settings UI, Dockerfile, CI workflow, Docker docs, and all documentation
steps: In src/app/(dashboard)/dashboard/settings/SettingsPageClient.tsx: remove the GoRouterStatusResponse type, all goRouter-related state variables (goRouterStatus, goRouterDraft, loadingGoRouter, savingGoRouter, restartingGoRouter, goRouterFeedback), the goRouterQuery useQuery call, the useEffect that syncs goRouterStatus from query data, the useEffect that sets loadingGoRouter from query pending state, the saveGoRouterMutation, handleSaveGoRouter, restartGoRouterMutation, handleRestartGoRouter functions, the loadGoRouterStatus function, and the entire <Card> block with <CardTitle>Go Router</CardTitle> in the JSX return

In Dockerfile: remove the entire 'FROM golang:1.22-alpine AS go-router-builder' stage (lines 18-29), remove the 'COPY --from=go-router-builder' line (line 53), simplify the entrypoint script in the RUN block to remove the go-router binary copy commands (mkdir bin, cp, chmod for go-router), change 'EXPOSE 12711 12778' to 'EXPOSE 12711'
In .github/workflows/agentic-validation.yml: remove the 'uses: actions/setup-go@v6' step with go-version-file, and remove the entire 'Go router check' step

In README.md: remove '-p 12778:12778' from the Docker run example, remove the paragraph about optional Go router binary and port 12778, remove '- **Optional Go router** as a separate `/v1/*` hot-path endpoint.' from Core Features list
In DOCKER.md: remove '-p 12778:12778' from all docker run examples (lines 16, 55, 76), remove the entire '## Go router' section at the bottom

In docs/DOCS.md: remove '- `/api/go-router/*`' from the API surfaces list, remove '-p 12778:12778' from the docker run example, remove the paragraph about Go router binary in Docker section, remove the mention of 'Go router controls' from the Security section sentence about management APIs

In docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: remove 'GOROUTER[Managed Go Router\nseparate child process]' from the mermaid flowchart, remove 'DASH --> GOROUTER' and 'GOROUTER --> CORE' lines from the flowchart, remove the entire '### Go Router Alternative' section (lines 1048-1052)
In docker/docker-compose.yml: remove the '- "12778:12778"' port mapping from the app service

In AGENTS.md: remove the entire '## Go Router Rules' section (lines 65-73), remove mentions of 'Go router work' from the docs usage guidance, remove '- Use `~/.axonrouter/bin` for Go router binaries.' line, remove '- Build the Go router as a separate automatically managed alternative endpoint, not as a replacement/fallback system.' from Architecture Direction

In tests/README.md: remove the go-router-lifecycle-contract.test.ts line from Coverage Focus, remove the production-hardening-contract 'Go router management auth guard' mention if it only relates to Go router, remove 'Go router build/test' line from Validation Status section
acceptance_criteria: No references to 'go-router', 'goRouter', 'GoRouter', 'Go router', 'Go Router', or port '12778' remain in any documentation, CI, Docker, or frontend files
Dockerfile builds without the go-router-builder stage and does not reference Go at all
The Settings page renders without any Go Router card/section
findings: All Go Router references removed from 11 files. Pre-existing typecheck errors (TS2882 CSS imports, TS2322 jsx prop) remain unchanged and are not related to this change. Also removed go-router route references from src/proxy.ts and src/dashboardGuard.ts which were not listed in the feature steps but were needed for completeness. Lint, typecheck, and build all pass.
